---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for byteDoc, byteSheet, or the hub
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

<!-- What are you trying to do? Describe the underlying need, not just
     the proposed feature. "I want to track my monthly budget" is more
     useful than "add a sum function" (which already exists). -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- How would this work from a user's perspective? A short mockup or
     description of the UI / interaction beats a paragraph of prose. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Did you try to achieve this with existing features? What didn't work? -->

## Scope check

<!-- byteworkz deliberately stays small. Please confirm the proposed
     feature doesn't violate any of these: -->

- [ ] No new runtime dependency (no `npm install`, no CDN script)
- [ ] No backend / cloud / account requirement
- [ ] Works without a build step
- [ ] Fits the dark-only voidcore-aligned visual identity
- [ ] Would be valuable to multiple users, not just my specific workflow

## Roadmap fit

<!-- Is this already listed in PUBLIC-RELEASE-PLAN.md? If yes, mention
     the version it's planned for. If you'd like to drive the
     implementation, say so here. -->
